title: Citrusy Mediterranean Farfalle Pasta
description: A light, citrusy, and flavorful Mediterranean pasta dish featuring tender farfalle, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the farfalle pasta according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add cherry tomatoes, kalamata olives, feta cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper, and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the tomatoes start to release their juices.
Stir in lemon juice, grated Parmesan, black pepper, lemon zest, and a sprinkle of red pepper flakes.
Add cooked farfalle pasta to the skillet and toss everything together, until the pasta is well coated with the sauce.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and fresh mint, and serve immediately.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional lemon wedges and parsley if desired.
